prompt: Our C3PAO assessment found 8 practices NOT MET. Can we still get certified? Explain conditional certification, which practices are POA&M-eligible, the minimum score requirement, and the closeout timeline.
assertions: Explains conditional certification: possible only if the assessment score is at least 88 (0.8 x 110) AND every NOT MET practice is POA&M-eligible

States POA&M eligibility rules correctly: only practices worth 1 point may be on a POA&M (no 5-point items; 3-point items excluded except limited partial-credit cases), and names non-POA&M-eligible critical examples (e.g., SC.L2-3.13.11 FIPS crypto, AC.L2-3.1.3, IA.L2-3.5.3)
States the closeout: POA&M items must be remediated and verified by a closeout assessment within 180 days, or the conditional certification lapses

Explains the consequence math for THIS scenario: 8 NOT MET practices are compatible with conditional certification only if all 8 are 1-point items and the score floor holds — otherwise remediate and re-assess
Mentions the annual senior-official affirmation in SPRS and that a lapsed conditional status affects contract eligibility
